title: Green Line LRT project undergoes upheaval
notes: FINDING TOOL / context (Tier 3). ~$850M wind-down figure is one of three figures presented on EVT-034 (provincial $1.53B / total $2.1B / wind-down ~$850M). UCP cut Green Line contribution 86% in 2019; passed 90-day withdrawal legislation.
verification_notes: Verified 2026-06-18. DATE CORRECTED: publication_date set to 2024-10-30 (was 2024-10-01). CAUTION: article references multiple in-body dates that are the true event anchors for the Green Line timeline (EVT-034); do not anchor events to the publication date. Event dates already set from R-046 (Sept 3 / Sept 11 2024).
